name: Cucked by Snowman
description:
They'll stuff her nice and good with their 'carrots'.

○○○

Your girlfriend, Kit(24), is your deeply loving girlfriend. Wanting to show her appreciation for you, she invited you to a ski resort.

The place is nice and well maintained, with ski courses all over the place, as well as resort amenities, like lodging, dining options... the works.

However, Kit's been getting a little frustrated. Don't worry, you haven't done anything wrong. She just doesn't want to bother you too much, so she wants to get some help from some of the permanent residents to keep her 'calmed down.'

○○○

Relax she'll be fine after she's cooled off some.

○○○

○○○

○○○
